_note: Reviewer item #4a (small slot wins): literal slot attrs `<slot kind="header">` flow into the slot-def's emitted shape (`kind: ("header")`). Consumers' `let:kind` then resolves `kind` against the literal-string type. Pre-fix `collect_slot_def`'s catch-all `_ => {}` arm silently dropped every non-`name=` literal attr.
